title: import_slot_v1 — manifest contract for diversity-atlas JSON-slot capture
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_slot'. Wraps GET /api/diversity/{slot} (the diversity_endpoint.py sidecar) and emits a staging_diversity_slot_v0 layer. target.slot must be one of the names exposed by GET /api/diversity/slots: embedded_tables, texture_metrics, functional_burden, roh_gene_overlap, divergence_network.
